methodsAttempted.query: site:utexas.edu "Acceptable Use of Generative AI Tools" "University of Texas at Austin"
methodsAttempted.notes: Found central acceptable-use, teaching policies, classroom requirement guidance, AI detection guidance, UT.AI overview, and lower-specificity unit pages.

methodsAttempted.query: University of Texas at Austin generative AI policy guidance students assessment academic integrity research
methodsAttempted.notes: Cross-check favored official utexas.edu pages; no third-party pages were used as evidence.

summary: Firecrawl search discovered official UT Austin pages on acceptable AI use, responsible adoption for teaching and learning, AI detection software, graduate education AI use, teaching-policy considerations, and classroom requirements. Lower-specificity initiative, overview, and unit pages were rejected. No login, paywall, CAPTCHA, hard WAF bypass, or Playwright escalation was needed.
